rows.label: qev010301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Yo! [ST:playername ]!
Thanks to you, I managed to get in touch with my team.
The leaders will be coming to pick me up soon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010301_MSG0002
rows.name:
...So, what're you doing out here?
If you've got some free time, wanna take on
an extermination request that was sent my way?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010301_MSG0003
rows.name:
You'd be up against a monster called a Bold Vasalt.
They keep popping up around here one after another
and getting in the way of BLADEs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010301_SEL0021
rows.name: Show no interest in the request.

rows.label: qev010301_MSG0004
rows.name:
Sounds like you're raring to go!
Don't worry, you can handle it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010301_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'll forward it to your terminal right now,
so give it a shot whenever you feel like it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010301_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hey now, even small missions like this are
one small step towards a great tomorrow for us Earthlings, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010301_MSG0007
rows.name:
Well, I'll forward it to your terminal anyway,
so give it a shot whenever you feel like it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Good luck hunting that monster.
The trick is... well, don't panic!
Stay calm and shoot it when it's vulnerable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010301_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Though coming from a guy who got chased around by them
and lost his comm terminal, that probably has zero credibility, huh?[ST:wait ]
